title: MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a mobile food pantry. Assists with filling out forms for SNAP and OHP. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primary focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 1st and 3rd Friday of the month 10am-noon Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-2667 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance Certificates/Forms Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Certificates/Forms Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Certificates/Forms Assistance * Immigrants Certificates/Forms Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Food Pantries Food Pantries * Hispanic/Latino Community Food Pantries * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE FOOD - ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HUMAN SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
